calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2008 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Jan-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Arlene Howell (Department 218)

Appearances
Petitioner, Sandra Ochotorena, is present as Guardian ad litem for Jyssica Basler, a minor Claimant, who is also present.
Attorney, Edward J. Nevin, appearing on behalf of the petitioner and minor claimant.

This cause comes on calendar this day for a Minor's Compromise. Sandra Ochotorena and Jyssica Basler are sworn. Sandra Ochotorena is examined by counsel, Edward J. Nevin.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved. The total gross amount of judgment in favor of the minor claimant is $30,000.00. From the total judgment, payment of fees is to be disbursed as follows: Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses expenses paid by the petitioner or attorney in the sum of $7,274.47. Attorney's fees is waived by counsel.

The balance of the judgment available for the claimant after payment of all allowed fess and expenses is $22,725.53, which is to deposited into a blocked account with The USBank, Susanville Office, 901 Main Street, Susanville, CA 96130. No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years old.

Order Approving Compromise of Disputed Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed by Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire in open court.
